subject: fixed restapicall JsonParser to handle :
commit_message:
fixed restapicall JsonParser to handle :

Fixed Restapicall JsonParser to process ":" if it
exist in the response body, this change is required
for casablanca too.

Change-Id: I83b0769eb13eb8d286cc70adc0e85823d6517dcd
Issue-ID: SDNC-519
Signed-off-by: shashikanth.vh <shashikanth.vh@huawei.com>

entries.message: Patch Set 1: Cherry Picked from branch master.

Patch Set 1: Verified+1

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-sli-plugins-casablanca-verify-java/4/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/ccsdk-sli-plugins-casablanca-verify-java/4

Patch Set 1:

Hi Dan, Please see if this can be taken for Casablanca. This is required as part of on-going CCVPN E2E integration testing (https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/CCVPN++-Test+Status)

Issue description:
Discovered topology contain parameters name with ":" this patch aims to strip the name till ":" since in DG we can't have ":" in parameter name.

Snippet of discovered topology parameters without this patch
[main] INFO org.onap.ccsdk.sli.plugins.restapicall.JsonParser - Added property: ietf-network:networks.network_length: 1
[main] INFO org.onap.ccsdk.sli.plugins.restapicall.JsonParser - Added property: ietf-network:networks.network[0].node_length: 1
[main] INFO org.onap.ccsdk.sli.plugins.restapicall.JsonParser - Added property: ietf-network:networks.network[0].ietf-te-topology:client-id : 6666
[main] INFO org.onap.ccsdk.sli.plugins.restapicall.JsonParser - Added property: ietf-network:networks.network[0].supporting-network_length: 1
[main] INFO org.onap.ccsdk.sli.plugins.restapicall.JsonParser - Added property: ietf-network:networks.network[0].ietf-te-topology:te-topology-id : 100
[main] INFO org.onap.ccsdk.sli.plugins.restapicall.JsonParser - Added property: ietf-network:networks.network[0].ietf-te-topology:provider-id : 5555

Snippet after this patch
[main] INFO org.onap.ccsdk.sli.plugins.restapicall.JsonParser - Added property: networks.network_length: 1
[main] INFO org.onap.ccsdk.sli.plugins.restapicall.JsonParser - Added property: networks.network[0].provider-id : 5555
[main] INFO org.onap.ccsdk.sli.plugins.restapicall.JsonParser - Added property: networks.network[0].client-id : 6666
[main] INFO org.onap.ccsdk.sli.plugins.restapicall.JsonParser - Added property: networks.network[0].network-id : providerId/5555/clientId/6666/topologyId/100
[main] INFO org.onap.ccsdk.sli.plugins.restapicall.JsonParser - Added property: networks.network[0].supporting-network_length: 1
[main] INFO org.onap.ccsdk.sli.plugins.restapicall.JsonParser - Added property: networks.network[0].te-topology-id : 100

This problem is generic and can happen for a RESTCONF get when the device/controller model is defined in YANG, since as per the RESTCONF/YANG standard ":" is use as a delimeter between namespace and node when data format is JSON.
Going forward I think there is a need to handle this ":" issues which is also applicable for RESTCONF Client in totality, I will look into the same.
Change has been successfully merged by Dan Timoney

Patch Set 1:

Build Successful 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-sli-plugins-casablanca-merge-java/4/ : SUCCESS

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/ccsdk-sli-plugins-casablanca-merge-java/4
